global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, abstract shapes, and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'VaultRun' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, in a muted color palette, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Cashback offer
elements.description: A prominent text block stating 'Earn cashback daily No hidden fees' in a clear, modern font, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily No hidden fees

elements.label: VaultRun title
elements.description: The title 'VaultRun' displayed in a bold and eye-catching font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, cashback offer, free trial
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, abstract shapes are centered, body text is at the bottom, and the CTA is at the very bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, No hidden fees, VaultRun, Try for free
